title: ComPOTability
description: A minecraft mod that compatabolizes multiple flower pot and decorated pot based mods to work together! Works dynamically!
body:
# ComPOTability

A compatibility mod that brings flower pot mods together and adds some cool stuff! This mod acts as a bridge between different flower pot mods and adds colored variants to make your builds look better.

## What This Mod Does

ComPOTability is basically a compatibility layer that makes sure different flower pot mods work together without conflicts. It also adds some nice features like colored hanging pots and dyed flower pots.

## Dynamic Mod Loading

This mod is smart about what it loads - it only activates features when the required mods are actually installed. Here's how it works:

### Arts & Crafts + NotEnoughPots Integration

*   **Only works when BOTH Arts & Crafts AND NotEnoughPots are installed**
*   Adds dyed flower pots for all vanilla crops (potatoes, carrots, wheat, etc.)
*   Creates colored variants of potted plants in all 16 dye colors
*   Includes proper loot tables so you get the dyed pot + plant when you break them
*   Arts & Crafts pots now work with most plants from other mods

### Beautify Integration

*   **Only works when Beautify is installed**
*   Adds colored hanging pots in all 16 dye colors
*   These work exactly like Beautify's original hanging pots
*   You can place flowers in them, grow them with bone meal, harvest with shears
*   Crafting recipes to convert existing hanging pots to colored versions

### Gilded Sherds Integration

*   **Only works when BOTH Arts & Crafts AND Gilded Sherds are installed**
*   Creates gilded versions of Arts & Crafts pottery sherds
*   Includes recycling recipes to blast gilded sherds back into gold nuggets
*   Uses the Bookshelf API for proper integration

## Crafting Recipes

### Hanging Pot Dyeing

*   Take any hanging pot + dye = colored hanging pot
*   Works with all 16 dye colors
*   Only available when Beautify is installed

### Hanging Pot Recoloring

*   Change the color of existing hanging pots
*   Useful for when you want to change your build's color scheme

### Gilded Sherd Recycling

*   Blast gilded Arts & Crafts sherds to get gold nuggets back
*   Only available when both Arts & Crafts and Gilded Sherds are installed

## Mod Dependencies

### Required

*   Fabric API
*   Moonlight Lib
*   Java 21+

### Optional (for specific features)

*   **Arts & Crafts** - For dyed flower pot functionality (requires NotEnoughPots)
*   **NotEnoughPots** - For extended plant compatibility (requires Arts & Crafts)
*   **Beautify** - For colored hanging pots
*   **Gilded Sherds** - For gilded Arts & Crafts sherds (requires Arts & Crafts)
## Credits

### Original Mod Creators for supported mods

* [Arts & Crafts (by KekeCreations)](https://modrinth.com/mod/artsandcrafts "Arts & Crafts (by KekeCreations)") - The amazing dyed flower pot system
* [Beautify: Refabricated (by Suel\_ki and Pandarix)](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated "Beautify: Refabricated (by Suel_ki and Pandarix)") - The hanging pot mechanics and models
* [Not Enough Pots (by anweisen)](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-pots "Not Enough Pots (by anweisen)") - Extended plant compatibility
* [Vanilla Backport: Chase the Skies, The Garden Awakens (by BlackGear)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport "Vanilla Backport: Chase the Skies, The Garden Awakens (by BlackGear)") - Eyeblossom and pale oak content
* [Rustic Delight (by PhantomWing)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight "Rustic Delight (by PhantomWing)") - Wild crop system
* [Gilded Sherds (by DarkhaxDev)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gilded-sherds "Gilded Sherds (by DarkhaxDev)") - The gilded sherd system and Bookshelf API

      
    Disclaimer: I used AI to organize description and code quickly, but not for anything else. I also edited all and checked three times to make sure nothing is inaccurate.
